title: What is instrumentality
wikitext:
[]: What is instrumentality?             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Oct 04, 2011 12:52 am I do not understand instrumentality and it's effects, because I found EoE did not make it entirely clear. Can somebody please shed some light on the subject for me?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Oct 04, 2011 1:11 am If you haven't already, you should check out the wiki: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Instrumentality[/url] It should be pretty much the first port of call for all Eva related questions.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 04, 2011 1:22 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11984 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9200 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11632 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10750 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10524 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9759 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=737 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3328 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=9011 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6431 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7609 ... Gendou: No, It's not that everything returns to nothingness. It's nothing but returning everything to the beginning. Nothing but returning things to the mother which has long since been lost. All the minds become one mind, obtaining peace forever. Nothing but that.

[]: Or what is "Where do we go from here?" Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Oct 04, 2011 1:34 am What is the Great Link? Or if you're just not that into Star Trek , you could always try the Overmind , but it's a lot more dry IMO.
